programme.title: Carry On at Your Convenience (1971)
programme.desc: Production at toilet manufacturers WC Boggs is brought to a halt when an over-eager trade union representative calls a strike. However, worker unrest is quickly quelled by a jolly trip to the seaside. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Cope, Hattie Jacques, Joan Sims, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey and Bernard Bresslaw

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Omnibus. Ray uses Faye to get his hands on the Metcalfes' house. Leanne throws herself into funeral arrangements. Yasmeen gives Imran a huge responsibility

programme.title: London Zoo: An Extraordinary Year
programme.desc: In March, ZSL London Zoo and its sister zoo Whipsnade fell silent as potential visitors stayed away. This two-part documentary reveals how a dedicated skeleton staff continued to care for the 20,000 animals in Regent's Park and the Dunstable Downs in Bedfordshire. Gemma and Meg must find a way to ensure that the pregnancy care for an endangered okapi isn't thrown off track by the lack of staff. Jamie continues the arachnid breeding programme, introducing a couple of huntsman spiders to each other - but it's a fraught business that could end in love-making or cannibalism

programme.title: Kate: The Making of a Modern Queen
programme.desc: Profile of Kate Middleton, how she has changed as person since her marriage to Prince William and what she means for the royal family. From comparatively modest circumstances, the Middleton family could not be more different from the Windsors, yet this is exactly what Prince William wanted - a royal life combined with comfortable marital stability and a continuation of the easier relationship with the British people started by his mother, Princess Diana. The couple met at St Andrew's University in 2001 and after several ups and downs were married at Westminster Abbey in 2011. Contributors include Anthony Seldon, Ferdinand Mount, Catherine Mayer, Emily Nash, Katie Nichol and Sarah Bradford

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The inspector and his sidekick DS Hathaway investigate the murder of a talented maths student. The prime suspect is the victim's ex-boyfriend, who is convinced his uncle has set him up, but old case papers belonging to Morse reveal the boy's family is hiding a dark secret. Laurence Fox and Rebecca Front co-star alongside Kevin Whately

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The detective suspects a connection between the death of a student with secret plans for advancement and the killing of well-known criminal Nicky Turnball, who was in Oxford to speak at the Union. As Lewis and Hathaway eliminate suspects from a long list of the crook's enemies, the investigation brings him into contact with old flame Diane - who also happens to be Turnball's wife. Kevin Whately stars, with Laurence Fox and Gina McKee

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When a housewife is found hanged in her home, the police initially mark it down as suicide. However, a meeting with an Oxford law professor prompts a sceptical Lewis and Hathaway to believe something more sinister is afoot - a suspicion confirmed by the death of another woman. Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox star

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective investigates a double poisoning, aiming to prove the innocence of Elinor Carlisle, the chief suspect in the deaths of her aunt and her rival in love. However, it emerges that she is the only person with a motive, opportunity and means to administer the poison. Crime drama, starring David Suchet, Elisabeth Dermot-Walsh, Diana Quick, Paul McGann and Rupert Penry-Jones

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: When the detective is called to investigate what appears to be a freak accident at Lady Matilda's College, he uncovers a potential link between a series of peculiar incidents across Oxford. Despite Thursday's scepticism, he becomes convinced the accidents are the result of foul play. Lady Matilda's is in the middle of a referendum campaign to decide whether or not the college should become co-educational - and when a woman is attacked while walking alone on a towpath, Endeavour and Thursday try to find the assailant before they strike again. Drama, starring Shaun Evans

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective is brought in to investigate when a former Met police officer is stabbed to death outside a nightclub in Newcastle. The team initially suspects a crime of passion after it emerges the victim had recently rekindled his affair with his childhood sweetheart, whose husband has a history of violence. However, Vera uncovers evidence pointing to a more complex case involving inside information and the hostile takeover of a brewery. What did the deceased find out that cost him his life? Guest starring Jill Halfpenny, Christine Bottomley, Ralph Ineson and Liam Cunningham

programme.title: Vanity Fair
programme.desc: Becky masters the fine art of living well on nothing a year, proving that a respectable public appearance is all you need to get credit. Her flirtation with Lord Steyne at least provides a reliable source of income, but the Sedley family are less fortunate. With her finances in tatters, a devastated Amelia is forced to send her son to live with the Osbournes. Becky rises to the very top of high society, even securing a royal audience - but Steyne expects something in return for his patronage, and when Rawdon is accosted by bailiffs, he seizes his chance

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid is left two large packing cases in an uncle's will - but they come with a terrible curse

programme.title: London Zoo: An Extraordinary Year
programme.desc: Part two of two. Jimmy the northern white-cheeked gibbon is missing the visitors and wondering when they will be back to see him again, while keepers Mick and Joe use the quiet time to build the confidence of rare Bactrian camel Genghis, helping him to venture outside of his paddock. The elephant keepers at Whipsnade are desperate for the Asian elephants to mate, although it seems there are no such problems with the small-clawed otters when keeper Laura notices they have had their first babies

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A cleaner is found dead in her home and suspicion immediately falls upon her lodger, who is arrested and convicted of her murder. It appears to be an open-and-shut case, but Superintendent Spence begins to question the man's guilt and invites Poirot to help uncover the identity of the real killer. The Belgian sleuth teams up with crime writer Ariadne Oliver (My Family's Zoe Wanamaker) as he tries to crack the case. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Richard Hope, Joe Absolom, Amanda Root, Sian Phillips and Raquel Cassidy

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Schoolgirl Jennifer Sutcliffe becomes embroiled in a mystery when priceless jewels are hidden among her belongings. The precious stones once belonged to a prince who fell foul of a revolution, and now his cousin is a pupil at the same school as Jennifer, where Poirot finds himself drawn into the unlikely situation and realises nothing is quite what it seems. David Suchet stars as the Belgian sleuth, with Harriet Walter and Claire Skinner

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway and Lewis investigate the death of a maintenance engineer found shot in the head in the basement of the Bodleian Library. A search of the man's house reveals a stash of valuable volumes and a connection to the local Gamblers Anonymous group, and the detectives go on to expose a scam involving two Oxford academics. Drama, guest starring Neil Pearson and Haydn Gwynne, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The death of Oxford don RG Cole leads to the shady underworld of unlicensed boxing and the involvement of academic Richard Helm. Investigations reveal the dead man's student Jack Roth was involved in a complex love triangle, and when the young man's rival is found dead in an apparent suicide, Lewis suspects foul play and discovers an old connection to Helm - along with a link to his former mentor Morse. Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox star

programme.title: The Good Karma Hospital
programme.desc: Ruby encounters new challenges as a blistering heatwave hits Kerala, while Lydia decides she is ready for her first solo night shift. But when a storm hits Barco, Ruby faces an agonising test that stretches her medical skills to the limits. Return of the medical drama set in southern Indian, starring Amrita Acharia and Amanda Redman

programme.title: The Good Karma Hospital
programme.desc: Lydia discovers that a former patient is in the care of a herbal doctor and is determined to win back her patient's trust. Meanwhile, Ruby and Gabriel treat a patient with a mystery condition - and Gabriel reveals something about his past. Drama, starring Amanda Redman, Amrita Acharia and James Krishna Floyd

programme.title: The Loch
programme.desc: A body is pulled from the loch and soon identified by the pathologist - while a photograph in the dead man's wallet provides Annie and Quigley with a vital clue. Annie tries to gather further evidence by talking to a desperate Mhari, who refuses to believe the terrifying possibility she is presented with concerning her own son. Albrighton is threatened with arrest by Quigley, but nevertheless continues to pursue his own theory about the killings - even if it means putting his life on the line to prove himself right

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A middle-aged Oxford graduate is found murdered, setting in motion an investigation that leads Lewis and Hathaway to one of the university's most senior dons, whose respectable exterior conceals a strange past. Before long a second death occurs, and it becomes apparent that both victims shared a secret - and that someone is out for revenge. Starring Kevin Whately, Laurence Fox, Anna Massey, Clare Holman and Sian Thomas

programme.title: Griff's Great Britain
programme.desc: Griff Rhys Jones explores the Highlands as he goes in search of Britain's second-largest bird of prey, travelling through the scenic and ancient landscape by a variety of means - but will he be able to track down the elusive golden eagle?

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid is worried about an intruder, and wonders whether to scare the man off or call the police

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chris tells Kim that Kelly has moved into the nursery flat. Zoe tries to smooth things over with the Windsors. Roy wants to make a big thing about Jan's homecoming

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Paddy thinks Biff should be told that he is really the father of Kelly's baby. Jed Outhwaite causes trouble in the hospital again, and Sarah argues with Rachel

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Harold Beecham angrily accuses his neighbour Roger Parslow when his dog dies from poisoning, and his refusal to co-operate with the police lands him in prison, where a tragedy occurs that puts PC Younger's career on the line. Meanwhile, Carol confronts a herbalist who was treating Harold, and the people of Aidensfield are intent on impressing a visiting radio journalist. Richard Todd and Ralf Little guest

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid wants a lie-in, but it is doomed from the beginning as Sally chases romance and Jean goes on a diet. Vintage comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid resolves to exercise a little discipline when Sally adopts a stray dog. Comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Roger's pre-match strategy has a dramatic impact in the team's hotel room on the night before the Cromer game. Comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: With Louisa visiting her mother in Spain to get some perspective on their marriage, Martin knows he needs to try to change for the sake of their relationship, so he endeavours to keep his promise to her to see a therapist. Aunt Ruth arranges an appointment for him with Dr Rachel Timoney, but a lifeboat training exercise causes problems for the doctor. Will he get back in time for his first session? Martin Clunes stars

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: Louisa opens a new boarding house, but the arrival of a mysterious new guest places the villa under police scrutiny. Gerry remains as devoted as ever to the island's wildlife, and announces his plans to open his own zoo. Margo is struggling to find clients for her beauty treatments, and resorts to desperate measures to find people to practice her skills on. The final series of the drama based on Gerald Durrell's books, starring Keeley Hawes

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Suspicion falls on Gina's new cellar man Len Carter when a valuable pendant is stolen from Emily Forster, a guest at the Aidensfield Arms. A search into the barman's past reveals a history of crime, but Emily appears more disturbed by the presence of pub comedian Tommy Tanner. Meanwhile, Peggy secures a good deal on a new vehicle and Geoff's need for speed gets the better of him

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon teases Will about being found in a compromising position with Dee. Sam is pleased when Kathy offers to restart his reading lessons. Sarah and Jack have a heart-to-heart

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Mandy is at the end of her tether with Paddy's snoring. Chris finds Kelly packing to leave. Marlon convinces Eric to let him run the wine bar for one evening a fortnight

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Vera pleads with Jack not to tell anyone that Terry tried to steal the takings. Martin is shocked to hear Don is going to be charged with attempted murder

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are assigned to protect Cowley's former girlfriend, now a controversial evangelist, from an assassin, but are unaware that the would-be hitman is right under their nose. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Rowan Atkinson's clumsy alter ego returns to cause more chaos as he puts his dubious first aid skills to good use on an unconscious man in the street, makes a meal out of the simple task of posting a letter, and jets off for the holiday of a lifetime

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Rowan Atkinson's comic alter ego embarks on another disaster-filled outing when he treats his hotel room to a makeover but ends up causing devastation

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The bumbling hero tries his level best to turn a babysitting job into a fun-packed day at the fair, but predictably makes a hash of it. Slapstick comedy, starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: A New Year's party falls flat, but Bean finds an ingenious way to beat the sales crowds and bag a bargain before getting down to some seriously ham-fisted DIY decorating. Slapstick comedy, starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show
programme.desc: Rishi Persad and the team are at Sandown on Tingle Creek day, where leading two-mile chasers are in action, plus action over the Grand National Fences at Aintree to preview

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Highlights from February 1975, featuring Luton v Newcastle, Norwich v West Bromwich Albion and Manchester City v Everton.

programme.title: ITV Football Classics
programme.desc: Gabriel Clarke introduces action from the semi-final at Wembley Stadium, which was decided by a penalty shootout. Bob Wilson presented the coverage, with analysis from Glenn Hoddle, Jack Charlton and John Barnes, and commentary by Brian Moore and Kevin Keegan

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Reports of attacks in a remote part of Ukraine take extreme angler Jeremy Wade on a hunt for an elusive lake monster, and to the site of the world's worst nuclear accident - Chernobyl's reactor number four. Can he reveal the culprit and deliver it to the scientists searching for evidence of mutant species?

programme.title: Sport Filler Shows (2020)
programme.desc: A selection of nine dart finishes from ITV Sport's darts coverage through the years. Every darts player strives to produce a perfect nine dart finish, but under the bright lights of the TV cameras, this pinnacle of darting prowess is even more impressive.

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Oli Bell presents another top-class day of National Hunt Racing from Sandown and Aintree. The feature race of the day is the 3.00 Tingle Creek Chase at Sandown over two miles. Chief supporting races on the card at Sandown include the 1.50 Henry VIII Novices' Chase and two very competitive handicaps. At Aintree there are two races over the Grand National Fences for the first time this season, including the Becher Chase, where some of the leading fancies for the National itself will be in action. Plus, there are some top-class chasers in action in the 2.40 Many Clouds Chase. Analysis from Mick Fitzgerald and Luke Harvey, reporting from Rishi Persad, Alice Plunkett, Matt Chapman and Sally Ann Grassick and commentary from Richard Hoiles

programme.title: Flash Gordon (1980)
programme.desc: American football quarterback Flash Gordon and journalist Dale Arden find themselves aboard a rocket ship designed by scientist Dr Zarkov, who intends to travel across space to locate the source of recent natural disasters. The three arrive on the planet Mongo, where they soon learn that the attacks are the responsibility of evil emperor Ming the Merciless, who is planning to destroy the Earth. Sci-fi comic-strip adventure, with Sam J Jones, Max von Sydow, Brian Blessed, Melody Anderson, Topol, Timothy Dalton, Ornella Muti, Peter Wyngarde and Mariangela Melato. Featuring music by Queen

programme.desc: Oli Bell presents action from four different racecourses on a Super Sunday of racing, with National Hunt racing from Huntingdon, Kelso, Cork and Punchestown. The afternoon starts with action from Ireland and the 1.25 Hilly Way Chase at Cork followed by the Grade 1 John Durkan Memorial Chase at 1.40 from Punchestown. That's followed by four races from Huntingdon, including the Grade 2 Peterborough Chase, and two races from Kelso, including the 3.20 four-mile Borders National. Analysis from Mick Fitzgerald, Luke Harvey and Matt Chapman, reporting from Sally Ann Grassick and commentary from Mark Johnson

programme.title: ITV Sport Stories
programme.desc: Gabriel Clarke introduces a selection of interviews, clips and profiles from the ITV archives featuring some of the biggest names in sport. In the first edition, Muhammad Ali discusses his ban from boxing and the Rumble in the Jungle, and takes part in an impromptu sparring session, while Brian Clough has a heated on-screen debate with Don Revie, his predecessor at Leeds. Plus, a revealing portrait of Welsh rugby talisman Alun Wyn Jones

programme.title: Police Academy 5: Assignment Miami Beach (1988)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: A temperamental film actress becomes the apparent victim of an abduction from the set of her latest movie, and Simon must find out whether her disappearance is a publicity stunt or something altogether more sinister. Roger Moore stars

programme.desc: The detective duo investigate a series of attacks on a giant corporation by a mysterious terrorist group, and uncover a shocking secret

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur looks forward to a big payout when an ex-con needs his help to recover the loot from a robbery committed 14 years earlier - but learns banks are not always as safe as they seem. Vintage comedy drama, guest starring Rula Lenska, Maurice Denman and Max Wall

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: An Israeli minister is abducted, and the ensuing suburban siege triggers an airborne pursuit as Bodie and Doyle try to save the day. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A £30,000 consignment of mercury is stolen and the squad is bemused when the prime suspect comes up with a cast-iron alibi - he was in the company of his 'mistress' hours before his planned wedding ceremony. Diana Dors guest stars in the crime drama, alongside John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: A diamond trail leads Templar to mannequins and murder. Classic adventure, starring Roger Moore as globe-trotting adventurer Simon Templar

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The sleuth investigates the case of a man who has acquired a well-paid but mysterious job - seemingly on account of his red hair. Period detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett and David Burke, with Eric Porter as Moriarty

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: An international banker is held to ransom, providing Makepeace with an ideal opportunity to prove a point to her chauvinistic partner as she too gets caught up in the hostage situation. Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber star

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Crooked property tycoon Ted Standen goes back on his word following the release from prison of his former business partner Alex Rowan. The vengeful ex-associate begins orchestrating attacks on Ted and his son John, and Terry is called upon to protect the youngster. Gareth Hunt and Alfie Bass guest star, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's girlfriend is critically injured in a restaurant bomb blast, prompting him to seek revenge. When it transpires the intended target was an apparently unimportant accountant, Bodie ignores Cowley's orders and begins probing the man's past. Lewis Collins stars

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A Scottish detective on the trail of a gang of crooks requests help, and the squad resolves to catch his quarry. However, it becomes apparent that the visiting sleuth is holding back some important information that Regan and his colleagues need to know. TV presenter Janet Ellis features in a supporting role

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which five nightclub workers from Bridgwater take on the Tenable Tower and attempt to win a £125,000 jackpot. Can they score a perfect 10 and bring the money home?

programme.title: Griff's Great Australian Adventure
programme.desc: Comedian, actor and travel enthusiast Griff Rhys Jones continues his journey Down Under. On the Spirit of the Outback, travelling to Queensland's west, Griff seeks to uncover what makes 'the good life' - from the glitz and glamour of the Gold Coast to the dreams of the Australian Outback, revered by bush poets and pioneers across history

programme.title: The World Is Not Enough (1999)
programme.desc: James Bond is assigned to protect the heiress of an oil dynasty after her father is killed in a bombing at MI6 headquarters. The attack is the work of an infamous terrorist who is unable to feel pain after surviving a gunshot to his head, and who now intends to destroy the world's supply of oil. Spy adventure, starring Pierce Brosnan, Robert Carlyle, Sophie Marceau and Robbie Coltrane

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Rowan Atkinson's clumsy alter ego returns to cause more chaos as he puts his dubious first aid skills to good use on an unconscious man in the street, makes a meal out of the simple task of posting a letter, and jets off for the holiday of a lifetime

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Rowan Atkinson's comic alter ego embarks on another disaster-filled outing when he treats his hotel room to a makeover but ends up causing devastation

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The bumbling hero tries his level best to turn a babysitting job into a fun-packed day at the fair, but predictably makes a hash of it. Slapstick comedy, starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: A New Year's party falls flat, but Bean finds an ingenious way to beat the sales crowds and bag a bargain before getting down to some seriously ham-fisted DIY decorating. Slapstick comedy, starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show
programme.desc: Rishi Persad and the team are at Sandown on Tingle Creek day, where leading two-mile chasers are in action, plus action over the Grand National Fences at Aintree to preview

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Highlights from February 1975, featuring Luton v Newcastle, Norwich v West Bromwich Albion and Manchester City v Everton.

programme.title: ITV Football Classics
programme.desc: Gabriel Clarke introduces action from the semi-final at Wembley Stadium, which was decided by a penalty shootout. Bob Wilson presented the coverage, with analysis from Glenn Hoddle, Jack Charlton and John Barnes, and commentary by Brian Moore and Kevin Keegan

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Reports of attacks in a remote part of Ukraine take extreme angler Jeremy Wade on a hunt for an elusive lake monster, and to the site of the world's worst nuclear accident - Chernobyl's reactor number four. Can he reveal the culprit and deliver it to the scientists searching for evidence of mutant species?

programme.title: Sport Filler Shows (2020)
programme.desc: A selection of nine dart finishes from ITV Sport's darts coverage through the years. Every darts player strives to produce a perfect nine dart finish, but under the bright lights of the TV cameras, this pinnacle of darting prowess is even more impressive.

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Oli Bell presents another top-class day of National Hunt Racing from Sandown and Aintree. The feature race of the day is the 3.00 Tingle Creek Chase at Sandown over two miles. Chief supporting races on the card at Sandown include the 1.50 Henry VIII Novices' Chase and two very competitive handicaps. At Aintree there are two races over the Grand National Fences for the first time this season, including the Becher Chase, where some of the leading fancies for the National itself will be in action. Plus, there are some top-class chasers in action in the 2.40 Many Clouds Chase. Analysis from Mick Fitzgerald and Luke Harvey, reporting from Rishi Persad, Alice Plunkett, Matt Chapman and Sally Ann Grassick and commentary from Richard Hoiles

programme.title: Flash Gordon (1980)
programme.desc: American football quarterback Flash Gordon and journalist Dale Arden find themselves aboard a rocket ship designed by scientist Dr Zarkov, who intends to travel across space to locate the source of recent natural disasters. The three arrive on the planet Mongo, where they soon learn that the attacks are the responsibility of evil emperor Ming the Merciless, who is planning to destroy the Earth. Sci-fi comic-strip adventure, with Sam J Jones, Max von Sydow, Brian Blessed, Melody Anderson, Topol, Timothy Dalton, Ornella Muti, Peter Wyngarde and Mariangela Melato. Featuring music by Queen

programme.desc: Inspired by his teenage years, Heston Blumenthal creates a meal dedicated to showing off the excesses of the 1980s. He begins by providing comedian Johnny Vegas, impressionist Jon Culshaw, singer Jamelia and columnist Caitlin Moran with a yuppie-themed starter of sake champagne served inside a giant mobile phone. Moving on, he serves up microwaved lobster, and concludes by combining ice-cream with tiramisu to create a unique dessert

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: A young couple ask George to help make sense of their poorly planned Victorian terrace, which currently means they have to go through the kitchen to get to the only bathroom in the house. They have big ideas, but without a budget to match it will prove to be a challenge. The architect also visits a mother in the Cotswolds who plans to knock together two tiny Grade II listed cottages to create a cosy family home. This will leave her with two kitchens, two sitting rooms and even two staircases. Can George come up with a plan to make the most of this arrangement?

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Jungle Mystery: Lost Kingdoms of the Amazon
programme.desc: Ella Al-Shamahi searches for the remains of ancient civilisations in the Amazon rainforest, beginning with the discovery of mysterious geometric shapes revealed by deforestation in Brazil. Ella also joins an indigenous community for whom this past is essential to establishing their land rights today and helps them prove once and for all that this land has been theirs for centuries

programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts is in Glasgow to investigate the impact of steam power on Britain's major towns in the 18th and 19th centuries. She also learns about the arrival of migrant workers in the city and how the insanitary conditions in which they lived, which made Glasgow both a hotbed of disease and a place of great medical advancement. Aerial archaeologist Ben Robinson flies his drone over Loch Katrine as he tells the story of how Victorian engineers overcame geographical barriers to bring fresh drinking water to the workers of Glasgow

programme.title: Britain's Wildest Weather
programme.desc: Footage of the most extreme weather conditions in the UK over the past year, from the worst floods in a decade and a freak landslide in Fife, to an account of being in a house when it is struck by lightning. The programme also explains the scientific reasons behind the wildfire that destroyed one of the UK's most precious nature reserves, as well as a look back at record-breaking days of both heat and rain

programme.title: Formula 1

programme.desc: Frank puts salt on Marie's home-made lasagne, causing her to think she is turning into a terrible cook, but Ray and Robert discover their father has lost his sense of taste - apparently because of a potency medication he is taking. Comedy, starring Peter Boyle, Doris Roberts, Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy chats non-stop through a basketball game, and Ray responds by suggesting to Robert that she talks too much - a criticism she does not take well. Comedy, starring Monica Horan and Ray Romano

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is forced to take Howard's place in the boys' video-game night while he is otherwise engaged with one of her friends. Simon Helberg, Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj's parents set him up on a blind date in the hope of initiating an arranged marriage, but after a promising start it becomes apparent that the girl in question is more interested in Sheldon. Meanwhile, Penny begins her new job as a bartender. Starring Kunal Nayyar and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon receive an invitation to present their research to a physics conference, but Sheldon's reluctance to pander to his peers causes conflict between the friends. An intervention by Penny makes matters worse. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa goes on an archaeological dig with the school, and uncovers an unusual fossil, which the townsfolk are convinced is the skeleton of an angel. Thinking he can make a profit out of the find, Homer steals it, puts it in his garage, and charges people to see it. With the guest voice of scientist Stephen Jay Gould

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After wreaking havoc in a department store, Bart is sent to a juvenile detention centre, where he meets fellow tearaway Gina - who helps him plot his escape. With the guest voice of Sarah Michelle Gellar

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa lets her imagination run wild when she makes a new friend and they create a magical kingdom together called Equalia, complete with characters and plotlines. But they find themselves facing a nightmare when the boundaries between reality and fantasy become blurred. With the voice of Emily Blunt

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer chat to Phillip Schofield, Dermot O'Leary, Chris Kamara, Will.i.am, Shakin' Stevens and Jason Derulo. Plus, there is music from Mica Paris

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa learns she is good at crossword puzzles and enters a city-wide contest. Homer opens a break-up service after discovering he has a flair for letting loved ones down, but gets himself into trouble with his daughter when he places a bet against her in the competition

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa takes a trip to the mall to buy a new gadget, while Bart manages to cause chaos. After making a hasty retreat, he befriends a boy named Bashir - but Homer begins to believe that his son's new pal is involved in a terrorist plot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns wins a professional basketball team in a poker game at the annual billionaires' retreat. He decides to build a state-of-the-art stadium in an effort to lure fans, but the proposed site is on the last remaining bee colony in Springfield - prompting Lisa to lead a protest

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host the first of two special Christmas baking contests. Contestants from past series will be taking part in the first set of festive challenges, under the watchful eye of judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood. The bakers are Tom and Yan from the 2017 series and Briony and Terry from 2018, and there is also a guest appearance by veteran rock band Status Quo, performing their classic hit Rockin' All Over the World

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Father Christmas
programme.desc: Festive animation based on the book by Raymond Briggs, focusing on Santa's leisurely life on the other 364 days of the year, before he sets off for his annual gift-giving sleigh ride. With the voice of Mel Smith

programme.title: The Snowman
programme.desc: Raymond Briggs' festive favourite, a wordless animated fantasy telling the story of a small boy whose snowman magically comes to life and whisks him off on the journey of a lifetime to the North Pole. Howard Blake's score includes the award-winning song Walking in the Air, which was taken to number five in the charts by a young Aled Jones, but is here sung by Peter Auty

programme.title: The Snowman and the Snowdog
programme.desc: Animated sequel to Raymond Briggs' classic festive tale The Snowman, telling the story of another youngster's magical Christmas. A boy's snowman and snowdog come to life at the stroke of midnight and take him on an adventure to the North Pole, where he and his new companions meet an assortment of colourful characters, including Santa himself, before returning home - where a wonderful surprise awaits

programme.title: Peter Rabbit (2018)
programme.desc: A mischievous rabbit has the run of a farm and its vegetable patch when the owner unexpectedly dies. When a relative inherits the property, he strives to rid his land of the rabbit and his woodland friends - but his feelings for a nature-loving woman complicate the battle of wits with the animal kingdom. Family comedy based on Beatrix Potter's stories, starring Domhnall Gleeson and Rose Byrne, with the voices of James Corden and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Rugby Union: Autumn Nations Cup Highlights
programme.desc: Ayo Akinwolere and guest Nolli Waterman present highlights of the final matches of the inaugural Autumn Nations Cup, including the final between England and France at Twickenham. Plus, Ireland v Scotland at The Aviva Stadium, Wales v Italy at Parc y Scarlets, and Georgia v Fiji at Murrayfield

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking at Christmas
programme.desc: Part one of two. Jamie Oliver looks at ways to make gifts to share with loved ones, including roasted mulled wine ham that's cooked and glazed in all the flavours of Christmas. Accompanied by cheeses you can flavour and deliver ready to be baked. Jamie and the children also create the ultimate yule log for their grandparents

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel Strawbridge attempt to renovate the orangery with the help of a roofing expert and some pre-loved slate, all the way from Wales. They also discover some unexpected history beneath their feet, and Angel finds two old daybeds in need of upcycling

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Steve Jones presents action from the 16th round of the campaign at Bahrain International Circuit. Due to the pandemic, the drivers have been faced with several new or altered circuits and were fighting to gain maximum points as the end of the season approaches. Lewis Hamilton has won all the new races included in this delayed season, and will have no doubt wanted to continue that 100 per cent record here. With analysis from David Coulthard and Mark Webber

programme.title: Insidious: The Last Key (2018)
programme.desc: A parapsychologist returns to her family home to investigate supernatural disturbances. Fourth instalment in the horror saga, starring Lin Shaye, Angus Sampson, Leigh Whannell and Spencer Locke

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by guest comedians Jon Richardson and Sindhu Vee for a light-hearted review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Christmas
programme.desc: An advent calendar competition and a guide to making a crochet garland for a fantastic alternative to tinsel. Plus, a craft maker turns forgotten textiles into decorative art. Kirstie Allsopp hosts

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Car-fan Tony's 1962 Jaguar Mark 2 has been in his family for well over 40 years. Due to complications following a stomach operation, he hasn't been able to restore the car himself and it has been sitting neglected in a garage for nearly two decades. With Fuzz Townshend battling to start the Jag's engine and Tim Shaw having to get his hands dirty making parts, it's a race against the clock to get this British classic finished on time

programme.title: Fifteen to One
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts the general knowledge quiz in which 15 contestants try to win a place in the end-of-series final, when a £40,000 jackpot will be up for grabs

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: The couple reveal some important news to each other as a tornado threatens Chicago, and Mike tries to reunite Peggy and Patrick after they decide to end their relationship. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Mike worries about Molly's state of mind when she finds herself at a crossroads with her career and makes a huge decision to give up her job as a teacher in order to follow her dreams of becoming a writer

programme.desc: A desperate Rebecca goes to extraordinary lengths to get a moment alone with Evan Drake as he prepares to move to Japan. Comedy, starring Kirstie Alley and Tom Skerritt

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra cannot understand why Ray keeps turning down her advances - not realising that playing it cool is all part of his latest devious plan to get what he wants. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Pat asks Robert to keep her cigarette habit a secret - but he later has to come up with an excuse when Amy smells smoke on him, leading to a string of revelations for the family

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the American comedy, Ray has a brush with death while undergoing minor surgery, but pulls through - leaving his family uncertain over whether to tell him what happened

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin agrees to a game of chess against Frasier - who keeps losing successive rematches but has trouble accepting defeat graciously. Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney star

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Egos inflate to record proportions as the Crane brothers clash during a court battle to decide the mental competence of an eccentric millionaire. Guest starring Donald O'Connor

programme.desc: Includes headlines and weather

Members of staff complain their pay cheques bounce, and the kitchen cooler is so unhygienic that Gordon makes the decision to close the restaurant on Valentine's Day - the busiest night of the year

programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien search for more items to fix up and sell on, visiting the Isle of Wight to meet a couple who have lots of unwanted militaria in their sheds. While Henry embarks on an ambitious project to turn y tank parts into hanging baskets, Simon plans to transform old insulators into studio flat lighting

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY

programme.title: Channel 4 News

programme.title: Luxury Christmas for Less
programme.desc: Sabrina Grant and Helen Skelton speak to former supermarket insiders and uncover what the stores know about people's tastes and shopping habits - and reveal how consumers can use that knowledge to get a brilliant Christmas at bargain prices. Retail psychologists explain the covert role of party food in getting customers to spend more than they need to, and why they are wasting money on champagne when they could buy just as good fizz for half the price

programme.title: Inside Poundland: Secrets from the Shop Floor
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary following the retailer's bid to shed its bargain basement reputation and go upmarket in an effort to attract new customers. Managing director Barry visits the Walsall branch to help with the launch of Project Diamond - a multimillion-pound investment into giving stores a makeover and branching into new product lines like frozen and chilled food

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on programmes including I'm a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here!, Michael McIntyre's The Wheel, Tiny World, The Undoing, This Morning, Good Morning Britain and First Dates. They also comment on the issue of lockdown tiers as reported on BBC News

programme.title: Newquay: 24/7 Party People
programme.desc: Documentary following groups of young people as they head to the Cornish town to find out for themselves whether it lives up to the hype as the UK's party capital. Two best friends from Sheffield arrive to party on their own terms, three beauty queens sample some of the town's delights, and a group of school friends hope to find love, but end up drunk instead. Meanwhile, a party from the Welsh valleys arrive with big intentions, only to find out that friendship matters more than frat house shenanigans

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

Ramsay faces the daunting task of reuniting a feuding family, before turning around the struggling restaurant, which currently has 126 dishes on the menu

programme.title: Grayson's Art Club
programme.desc: Alongside his wife, psychotherapist and author Philippa Perry, Grayson takes viewers behind the scenes at Manchester Art Gallery for the preparation of an exhibition of work produced during his six-part series Grayson's Art Club. The artist is reunited with some of the members of the public who had their entries selected for the exhibition, as well as some of the celebrity guests and well-known artists from the show. Once lockdown is lifted, Manchester Art Gallery will re-open with Grayson's Art Club, which will run until mid-April

programme.desc: Cameras follow 24 hours of life on the factory floor at the McVitie's factory in Carlisle, documenting the work of the staff making some of the nation's favourite biscuits. The programme follows the whole production line process, from mixing the dough and baking the biscuits, to the engineering teams keeping the machines running, and staff offer first-hand accounts of life working in the oldest biscuit factory in the world. Plus, a look at the rich history of the royal family Christmas, going back to Victorian times. Contributors include royal insiders and cultural historians

The only hope of defeating the vengeful creature is to find a magical suit of armour belonging to the boy's father - but finding it will entail matching wits with an assortment of monstrous foes. Animated adventure, with the voices of Charlize Theron, Art Parkinson and Matthew McConaughey

programme.title: Percy Jackson: Sea of Monsters (2013)
programme.desc: The modern-day teenage son of the Greek god Poseidon must lead his friends on a perilous journey into the Bermuda triangle. They need to recover the legendary Golden Fleece to save the world, but getting to it means braving all manner of terrifying monsters. Fantasy adventure sequel, starring Logan Lerman and Alexandra Daddario

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 1 (2014)
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen is brought to a secretive underground society following the destruction of the televised deathmatch. She becomes the figurehead of a revolution against the despotic Panem regime, while her friend Peeta remains a captive of its tyrannical president. Part one of the two-part conclusion to the sci-fi adventure series, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Philip Seymour Hoffman, Julianne Moore and Donald Sutherland

programme.title: Planes, Trains and Automobiles (1987)
programme.desc: A stressed businessman just wants to make it home to spend Thanksgiving with his family. However, when his flight is forced to land miles from its destination, he finds himself sharing a disaster-strewn journey across America with an amiable but slobbish salesman. Comedy road movie, starring Steve Martin, John Candy, Laila Robins, Kevin Bacon and Michael McKean

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation (2015)
programme.desc: The team of secret agents faces being shut down when the head of the CIA convinces the US Senate that it is too dangerous. The operatives of the Impossible Mission Force become fugitives when they defy orders and plot to bring down a shadowy society of assassins. Spy thriller sequel, starring Tom Cruise, Jeremy Renner, Rebecca Ferguson and Simon Pegg

programme.title: Kill List (2011)
programme.desc: A hitman with money worries is persuaded by his old partner to take on one last job. The duo's mysterious client presents them with a list of three targets, but as they go about their deadly work, they start to realise there is something far more disturbing going on than a simple act of murder. Thriller, with Neil Maskell, Michael Smiley and MyAnna Buring

programme.title: A Christmas Carol (1984)
programme.desc: Miser Ebenezer Scrooge is given a Christmas Eve to remember when a quartet of ghosts - his dead business partner and the spirits of Christmases past, present and future - turn up determined to cure him of his money-grubbing ways. Adaptation of Charles Dickens' classic, starring George C Scott, Nigel Davenport, Frank Finlay, Angela Pleasence, David Warner, Edward Woodward and Susannah York

programme.title: Mary and the Witch's Flower (2017)
programme.desc: A strange flower grants a girl magic powers. Animated adventure based on The Little Broomstick by Mary Stewart, featuring the voices of Kate Winslet and Jim Broadbent. Dubbed in English

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen (2009)
programme.desc: The war between the shape-shifting robots erupts once again, as the first of the evil Decepticons leads an attack on Earth to locate an ancient planet-destroying machine. Hapless teenager Sam Witwicky is caught in the middle of the ensuing conflict as he holds the key to discovering the location of the device. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Shia LaBeouf and Megan Fox

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 2 (2015)
programme.desc: The civilisation of Panem is consumed by a bloody civil war. Reluctant rebel leader Katniss Everdeen leads a band of her allies on a mission to end the conflict at one stroke by assassinating the despotic President Snow - but faces many dangers as she closes in on her target. Conclusion of the sci-fi adventure series based on Suzanne Collins' novels, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Donald Sutherland and Philip Seymour Hoffman in his final role

programme.title: Red (2010)
programme.desc: A retired CIA agent survives an assassination attempt and realises something in his past has made him a target. He sets out to reunite the members of his old hit squad to find out who is trying to kill them and why, but in the process, uncovers dangerous secrets. Action thriller, with Bruce Willis, Morgan Freeman, John Malkovich and Helen Mirren

programme.title: Gone Girl (2014)
programme.desc: A woman disappears without trace on her fifth wedding anniversary. Her husband contacts the police, but struggles to cope as his marriage is scrutinised by the media. As his behaviour grows stranger and more evasive, he finds himself accused of her murder. David Fincher's crime thriller based on Gillian Flynn's novel, starring Ben Affleck, Rosamund Pike and Neil Patrick Harris

programme.title: Scribe (2016)
programme.desc: A recovering alcoholic finds himself at the centre of a political conspiracy after he accepts a shady job transcribing calls from tapped phones. Thriller, starring Francois Cluzet, Denis Podalydes and Sami Bouajila. In French

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: A future government has eradicated all deafness. A time traveller is sent to the present to find and stop the inventor of the cure before it's too late

programme.title: The Far Horizons (1955)

programme.title: Appointment with Danger (1950)
programme.desc: A nun is targeted by two murderers when they realise she is the only witness to one of their killings, and it is up to postal inspector to protect her and bring the men to justice. Noir thriller, starring Phyllis Calvert, Alan Ladd and Paul Stewart

programme.title: Comanche Station (1960)
programme.desc: A cowboy recruits a trio of outlaws to rescue a woman held captive at a Comanche camp and reunite her with her husband in return for a large reward. However, his partners decide the bounty should be split three ways rather than four and plan to double-cross him. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Nancy Gates, Claude Akins and Skip Homeier

programme.title: Buchanan Rides Alone (1958)
programme.desc: A drifter rides into a town dominated by the members of a ruthless family. He befriends a Mexican in jail for killing a man who attacked his sister and tries to save him from the gallows, getting caught up in the evil clan's running internal conflicts in the process. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Craig Stevens, Manuel Rojas and Barry Kelley

programme.title: Ghostbusters (2016)
programme.desc: When a series of supernatural disturbances occurs in New York City, two experts in the paranormal investigate, joined by a brilliant inventor who has created an array of ghost-hunting gadgets and a public transport worker whose knowledge of the city provides vital clues to the sinister cause of the ghostly activity. Reboot of the 1980s comedy franchise, starring Kristen Wiig, Melissa McCarthy, Kate McKinnon, Leslie Jones and Chris Hemsworth

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back (2016)

Director Edward Zwick's blockbusting action thriller sequel based on Lee Child's novel, starring Tom Cruise, Cobie Smulders, Danika Yarosh and Aldis Hodge

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Pasadena, California, where he visits Jamaican-themed restaurant Cafe Kingston. The business in run by Dr Una Morris, a micro-managing owner who also works at a radiotherapy clinic next door, and is determined to introduce hospital-style techniques to the kitchen by sealing everything in plastic bags

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Eagle Rock in California to try to change the fortunes of Capri, a grubby restaurant which often remains closed during lunchtime because of the twin owners' lazy attitude. A crisis ensues as soon as Gordon Ramsay instructs the duo to clean the place, revealing that only tough measures are likely to save the business

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: A scary TV movie motivates Barry to beg his father to build an underground bunker for the family, but Murray isn't easily persuaded. Erica and Adam go over the top with lavish Mother's Day gifts for Beverly before bringing important requests to her. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As the academic year comes to a close, Barry and Erica wonder how they will appear in the school yearbook and pressure Adam, who is on the team producing it, to see the rough layout before it goes to print. Murray is annoyed when Marvin pays a visit to ask for money. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica cannot wait to get out of the house as Graduation Day approaches - until it dawns on her how much her mother's affection means to her. Barry's plans for a summer with Lainey turn to dust, while Dana makes an unexpected visit. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Hayley Orrantia

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly and Murray help Erica move into her college dormitory, where her room-mate is also named Erica, but Beverly has a hard time saying goodbye to her daughter. Now that Lainey has gone to college, Adam tries to find the perfect girlfriend for Barry, even pretending to build one, as in the film Weird Science

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After a sleepless night, Leonard breaks his room-mate agreement with Sheldon. Howard makes preparations to go on a flight to the International Space Station and enlists Raj's help to ensure he gets a cool astronaut nickname

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon uses his holidays to help Amy in her biology lab, but moans about the menial jobs he is given - until she asks him to dissect a brain. Penny grows curious about Leonard's attitude to marriage when Bernadette asks Howard to sign a pre-nuptial agreement

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard devise a contest to decide whether Sheldon or Kripke should get Professor Rothman's vacant corner office. Meanwhile, Penny receives the gift of a painting from Amy to celebrate their friendship, but discreetly tries to dispose of it with help from Bernadette

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon refuses to get his hair cut as his regular barber is in a coma - a solitary change that causes chaos in the rest of his well-ordered life. Meanwhile, Howard undergoes a gruelling Nasa training programme in Houston, Texas, meaning he can only communicate with Bernadette via the internet

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is disappointed with Sheldon when he announces he is breaking his promise to go with her to a birthday party in favour of joining the boys for a Star Wars video-game marathon. Comedy, starring Mayim Bialik and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny buys Leonard and Sheldon some Star Trek action figures, but the duo refuse to remove them from the packaging in case their value is diminished. Elsewhere, Raj is desperate to find someone to accompany him to a wedding and asks his parents to find him a date. Featuring the guest voice of Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard is put in charge of looking after Stephen Hawking's wheelchair when the famous scientist comes to lecture at the university for a week - and takes advantage of his position to blackmail Sheldon into performing assorted unpleasant tasks. Guest starring Stephen Hawking

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Raj organise a stag party for Howard, but stories about his sexual history are unwittingly revealed, and he has to persuade bride-to-be Bernadette not to call off the wedding. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The gang goes on the infamous sociology and geography field trip to Swanage, during which Neil tries his hardest to avoid the advances of over-friendly teacher Mr Kennedy. Meanwhile, Will takes a shine to new girl Lauren - but she is only interested in Simon. Comedy, starring Simon Bird

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will is unhappy about being forced by Mr Gilbert to take a work experience job at a garage due to a mix-up that sees Neil joining a newspaper. Meanwhile, Jay sorts out a placement for himself and Simon at his father's plant hire company. Starring Simon Bird and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will plans to celebrate his birthday with a grown-up dinner, but his friends face a dilemma when they discover the event clashes with a more popular party. They end up gatecrashing the rival gathering, only to find that Simon's French exchange student steals the limelight

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will tries to reinvent the boys' image by taking them clubbing around London, but Simon is unsure whether to go until Carli shows an interest in the outing. When the friends arrive in the West End, their efforts to appear cool are hampered by aggressive bouncers, a tramp and some angry bus passengers

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber To (2014)
programme.desc: Dim-witted friends Harry and Lloyd are reunited after 20 years. When Harry discovers he has a daughter he never knew about, he breaks his friend out of a psychiatric hospital and they go on a road trip with the intention of fulfilling parental responsibilities neither of them is capable of. Comedy sequel, starring Jim Carrey and Jeff Daniels

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies presents another assortment of absurd assignments, as Alex Horne tries to ignore Richard Herring hiding menacingly in a bush, Katherine Parkinson pays a visit to the fridge, Mawaan Rizwan steals a cup of tea and Johnny Vegas takes a tumble

programme.title: First Dates Abroad

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: More than a decade ago, Kevin McCloud visited Brighton to meet a co-operative of 10 families, including former travellers and single parents, who were building their own and each other's homes, with the promise that the council would allow them to live in the finished properties at a reduced rent. For two years they laboured, balancing a 30-hour week with various other commitments. Now the presenter returns to see whether the houses, and the community that built them, have stood the test of time

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Simran Samra hosts the first party in east London, and decides to cook meat for her main course, despite being a vegetarian. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Comedian Yoshki Greenberg hosts the second dinner party in east London, but her decision to surprise the guests by asking them to wear animal-themed pyjama suits does not go down well - leaving her struggling to win them over with a stand-up routine

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Alan Price hosts the third party in east London, and sets out to impress his fellow competitors with a medieval-themed dinner. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: A selection of the team's favourite investigations. programme.desc: Architect George Clarke meets a young couple who have come up with a radical way of getting onto the housing ladder - they are building a home almost entirely from scrap on a budget of zero pounds. programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George meets a father and daughter who are turning an American school bus into a festival campervan and in Germany he visits a young father who has made a home from a grain silo. programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: In a special edition of George Clarke's Amazing Spaces, the architect follows his friend, eco-designer Max McMurdo, as he works on his own project. Having sold his house, he plans to use the £50,000 profit to build a custom-designed floating home in a 40ft shipping container, mooring it in a local marina and beginning a new life on the water. As well as following Max's progress, George gets a taste for the lifestyle, visiting a cutting-edge wraparound glass house near Canary Wharf in London's Docklands and travelling to Denmark, a nation responsible for some of the most ingenious floating homes in Europe

programme.desc: Handyman Jon Wicheard hosts the third dinner party in Bath. Denis Verrier suspects the food will not be up to his exacting standards, and sandwich enthusiast Becky Tyler also doubts the meal will be a success. The prospect of a disco excites vegetarian and former raver Mel Lewis-Leger, but society girl Liv Sargeant dreads the thought of any form of forced entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Cafe worker Becky Tyler hosts the fourth dinner-party challenge from Bath. The theme is a 'Mad Hat' tea party, and she sets out to put on a menu of British classics, but the round of sandwiches for starters might prove too much for the diners

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Patriotic Frenchman Denis Verrier hosts the final dinner party in Bath, and hopes his experience of working in the hospitality industry will stand him in good stead. However, two of the guests are shocked by what they find in his wardrobe, and his staging of a penalty shoot-out provides more surprises, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the Cliffemount Hotel in Runswick Bay, North Yorkshire, where general manager Garry Healey and housekeeper Zara Doherty hope to impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to the Quayside Hotel in Boston, Lincolnshire, run by hospitality newbies Alistair Arundel and partner Lana Keptanare

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Hollington Park Glamping near Newbury, Berkshire, hosted by couple Claire Lennon and Adam De Marco

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Daniele Spiers welcomes her rivals to Swan House in Essex, where a wine tasting threatens to leave a bad taste in the mouth and there is continental confusion at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition sees the B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. The Cliffemount Hotel is first to host and Garry and Zara want to get to grips with Claire and Adam's breakfast grumbles

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Alex Sullivan hosts the first party in Chelmsford, Essex, hoping to impress with her birthday party-themed evening. However, an uncomfortable reunion between two former school friends gets the night off to a bad start, and a less than satisfactory dessert leaves the host with little to celebrate

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Businessman Scott Johnson hosts an 'Essex Glam-themed' night for the second dinner party of the week in Chelmsford, Essex. His menu initially impresses his guests, until they realise he has taken some shortcuts with his preparations. However, a bigger problem emerges when former classmates John Mabey and Martin Young renew old hostilities, so Scott tries to lighten the mood by taking everyone for a dance in 'Essex's smallest disco' - his kitchen

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Deb Croghan hosts the third dinner party in Chelmsford, Essex, and hopes to impress her guests with a tarts and vicars-style evening. Following an uncomfortable game of guessing everyone's age, she perks up the evening with an unusual entertainment - a cucumber-based sport she claims is a traditional family pastime

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Twenty-five-year-old hot-tub salesman John Mabey hosts the fourth dinner party in Chelmsford, Essex, setting out to woo his guests with a Shakespearean evening featuring an Italian-style menu, but when his food comes close to a complete fiasco, he turns to theatrics to save the day - including asking his guests to act out Romeo and Juliet

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Martin Young hosts the final dinner party in Chelmsford, Essex, hoping to impress his guests by throwing a Caribbean-themed evening. The diners are pleasantly surprised by the quality of his food and shocked when he reveals a secret talent, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets neurologists Penny Talelli and Mark Edwards, who plan to combine their love of old and contemporary architecture as they transform a derelict Victorian gatehouse in north London. However, the pair soon find themselves struggling to balance their busy working lives alongside project managing the build

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: More than 60,000 people in Wiltshire have mental health issues, but with support services across the UK being cut it is falling to the emergency services to pick up the pieces. This edition focuses on Wiltshire Police and South West Ambulance call handlers who regularly find themselves counselling people with severe mental health episodes, including one who calls 999 every three seconds claiming he is the archangel Michael

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: The edition focuses on the rapidly growing number of 999 calls connected to the over-75s. In Warminster, the emergency services are called to a crash involving three cars, which has left one person with life-changing injuries and was caused by a 75-year-old man who suffered a suspected heart attack at the wheel. PC Phil Bridge is searching Trowbridge to find a 73-year-old woman who is in the latter stages of dementia and has disappeared while out shopping with her son

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 72-year-old is airlifted to St George's after being trampled by a herd of cows while walking her dog, and 13-year-old Tamzen has broken her leg at school trampoline practice. Meanwhile, 18-year-old art student Hermione has cut her hand on a glass at her part-time waitressing job

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a restaurant in Mount Sinai, New York, which appears to be stuck in the 1980s. The crumbling decor and unenthusiastic head chef at the Handlebar need to be tackled, but owners Bill and Carolyn LeRoy are in denial about the problems they face

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: More than 60,000 people in Wiltshire have mental health issues, but with support services across the UK being cut it is falling to the emergency services to pick up the pieces. This edition focuses on Wiltshire Police and South West Ambulance call handlers who regularly find themselves counselling people with severe mental health episodes, including one who calls 999 every three seconds claiming he is the archangel Michael

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Curious four-month-old terrier puppies Bobo and Lenny start scouting out their new surroundings at the centre. The brother and sister are completely different in looks and personality, but both need a forever home. Meanwhile, the staff bring together 82-year-old Alan and lhasa apso Ruby, both of whom are looking for comfort after losing a loved one

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another selection of the team's favourite investigations, including Kate Quilton's visit to McVitie's in Carlisle to find out why so many biscuits have little holes all over them. Jimmy Doherty heads to Portugal to see how corks are made for wine bottles, while Matt Tebbutt is in Italy to learn why mascarpone is more expensive than other soft cheeses

programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp teams up with potter Richard Miller to help Ellie and Nick Harrington - who have no practical DIY skills - create plates to complement their 1930s-style dining room in Tunbridge Wells, Kent

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Ex-RAF officers Simon Stenning and Amanda Butcher have been visiting the Caribbean island of Antigua for several years, and now hope to find the perfect winter home there. Ben Hillman helps the pair, showing them five properties for their £330,000 budget

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team visits Swindon and Chippenham, where Henry Cole finds and restores a much-maligned BSA Ariel 3 moped and Simon O'Brien gives a Ford Transit gearbox a new lease of life

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole makes good money restoring an antique pine sideboard in Sheffield, but has less success with a pair of old brass jugs, while Simon converts a staircase into shelves

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Rebecca battle to get their chateau looking tip top for a tour operator who may potentially want to put it on his books for visitors to the nearby Le Mans motor racing track. Motorcycle-loving couple Martin and Kim continue their roller coaster search for a dream chateau. The clock is ticking for Fiona as she has 24 hours to prepare for her first ever wedding, and ensure that her 12-acre grounds are picture perfect for the big day. Karen, Paul and their two children need to make their chateau attractive to guests. Their latest plan is to restore a disused hen house, but tensions rise when Paul doesn't meet Karen's standards

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: A couple in Shrewsbury comes up with a modern take on a Victorian terrace, but a growing family and a series of delays caused by planning regulations threaten their plans

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners of the Sea Verge Hotel in Paignton, Devon, try to prove their B&B offers the best value for money. However, Tony and Chris Fulbrook's guests are far from happy, with Christine Hale complaining about the noise from the sea and scolding Chris for serving breakfast in her slippers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves on to the Portcullis Hotel in Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, where mother-and-daughter owners Christine and Jenna Hale make a poor first impression by cajoling their guests into taking part in a karaoke session that runs until 2am. Matters worsen the following day, as a caricaturing workshop does little to alleviate the tension among the contestants

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Entrepreneur Andy Scott hosts at the Orchid Hotel in Bournemouth, and takes on Richard Bailey in the boxing gym. Christine and Jenna Hale are unhappy to find foreign objects in their beds, and a spot of flirting is brought to a swift halt when the owner receives some negative feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Orles Barn in Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, where owners Richard and Kelly Bailey impress their guests with the beauty and quality of the accommodation. The contestants then head to a local organic supplier to pick asparagus for their dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the week's competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: The Rothschild's giraffes are expecting a new addition as 12-year-old matriarch Dagmar, whose last calf died after a few days, goes into labour after a 15-month pregnancy. Orang-utan sisters Tuti and Siska, and their baby cousin Kesuma, rebuild their relationship after the trauma of the fire that engulfed their habitat in December 2018, while the keepers set off in pursuit when a blue-throated macaw goes on the run

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Rebecca receive a booking and prepare for the imminent arrival of their first paying guests. Martin and Kim take their chateau search up a gear and view the last property on their list. Paul and Karen embark on creating a cinema room in their barn, but the building looks set to collapse and their hopes of breaking even start to crumble. Angel helps to cushion the blow by upholstering a family heirloom

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: Chris Moller meets a man tries to build an off-grid house on Slipper Island. But getting to the site is a hard enough job, braving rough weather and the dangerous Tairua sandbar

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets designers Beth Dadswell and Andrew Wilbourne, who have rescued a crumbling Victorian dairy in south-east London and plan to convert it into a family home, while retaining as much of the ramshackle roof, rust and crumbling brickwork as possible. However, as they begin stripping back the old building, the true extent of its condition becomes plain, and the couple have to decide quite how much decay they are willing to live with

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree await the arrival of their guests, who are expecting a luxurious Christmas at the chateau. Dick continues work on installing the lift, but the project tests his ingenuity to the limit, while Angel finds more valuables in the attic, including a collection of vinyl records

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: An episode focusing on the lengths the staff go to in the line of duty, with patients including 23-year-old Joe, who is rushed to St George's after his cousin accidentally stabbed him in the thigh. Psychiatric nurse Christie, 25, arrives in resus with severe burns after being attacked by a patient, and two-year-old Freddie won't let doctors look in his eye after complaining of pain

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts, with Sean Lock and Stephen Mangan taking on guest captain Richard Ayoade and Katherine Ryan. Bill Bailey is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent, while Rachel Riley is in charge of the letters and numbers

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Emergency 911
programme.desc: In Austin, Texas, Luddy and Finch respond to the heroin overdose of a 19-year-old patient, while Niki and Nicole treat a woman suffering emotional trauma in Baton Rouge, Louisiana

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Nervous young labrador Loki arrives at the centre, and soon meets seasoned dog owner Sharron, a Royal Navy nurse. But will a recent injury prevent her from taking him in? Small terrier Midnight is also looking for a forever home, although when he is introduced to a couple dealing with the pain of not being able to have children, he only has eyes for one of them

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Europe's biggest brewery - Heineken in the Netherlands - on a mission to explain the difference between lager and ale. His journey takes a surprising twist when he comes face to face with the mother of all lagers. Kate Quilton sets Matt Tebbutt the challenge of making crumpets, and finds out how they get filled with unique holes at the Warburtons factory in Enfield, north London. Matt also heads for snowy Canada to discover why maple syrup is so expensive, and finds out that maple syrup robberies are a big concern to the industry

programme.desc: Border Patrol agents in Ajo, Arizona spread out to patrol one of the most dangerous drug routes in the Southwestern United States

programme.title: Drug Wars
programme.desc: Border Patrol's elite tactical unit, BORTAC, seeks to capture a group of traffickers who are determined to move their drugs through the desert

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson puts the Renaultsport Twingo 133 through a stringent examination in Belfast - with a helping hand from actor Ross Kemp. Richard Hammond samples the delights of racing airport vehicles, and James May takes the Vauxhall Insignia VXR for a drive in the company of Margaret Calvert, whose ideas were central to the design of modern British road signs. Film director Guy Ritchie is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car, and there is also a group test of high-performance off-roaders from BMW, Audi and Range Rover

programme.title: Rick Stein's Far Eastern Odyssey
programme.desc: The chef continues his exploration of the Far East's most diverse food cultures, travelling to Penang, Malaysia, to sample its multifaceted cuisine, which includes Malay, Indian, Chinese and British flavours. He also meets food writer Fay Khoo to explore the popularity of the region's fish-head curry, before crossing the Indian Ocean to Sri Lanka, where he visits a bustling fishing village and takes part in an unusual expedition

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike tries to buy a set of art deco cigarette machines, and one of the duo's recent purchases leaves an appraiser speechless

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank find a huge sculpture of Elvis and trawl through a trailer full of rare art and military memorabilia

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The hosts bid to prove that cars can be art by filling a gallery in Middlesbrough with motoring-related works, including a few creations of their own. programme.title: Cop Car Workshop
programme.desc: John Heussi embarks on a complete redesign of Cheshire Constabulary's fleet of outdated forensic vans and a crime car comes in with a faulty wailer - but the fault remains elusive

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: The tensions of sharing a weekend cottage with friends are much in evidence as Lee and Lucy spend three nights in the New Forest with Toby and Anna. Comedy, starring Lee Mack, Sally Bretton, Hugh Dennis and Abigail Cruttenden

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: When Charlie's school gets a bad Ofsted rating, Lee and Lucy start looking around for alternative schools. Despite Frank's protests, Geoffrey and Wendy offer to pay to send Charlie to be privately educated, which presents Lee and Lucy with a moral dilemma

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee thinks the twins are too young to be taught about sex at school and that their teacher Miss Anstis is too stuck up to teach it. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton
