programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by comedian Sara Pascoe for a two-day test of the mini break merits of Valencia, Spain's third largest city. After dropping their bags at the Hotel Caro, they set off along the path of the Turia river. Richard also enrols them at paella school to make authentic and vegan versions of the dish. The next day begins with a visit to Valencia's iconic City of Arts and Sciences, home to an Imax cinema, planetarium, opera house and aquarium, though Richard and Sara forgo these attractions to try zorbing instead

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and comedian Joe Lycett head to the mini break mecca of Amsterdam. Their two-day hurtle through the city's attractions takes in culture, canals, cuisine, and other things not necessarily beginning with C. As part of their whistle-stop tour, the duo doss down in one of the city's hippest hotels, take a battery-powered boat tour, do some drawing, and peer into the world of the water bear. The brave travellers also sample some Dutch gin known as jenever, and visit the city's street organ museum

programme.title: The Misadventures of Romesh Ranganathan
programme.desc: The comedian visits countries that are rarely visited by tourists to get a sense of the local culture and find out if they deserve their reputation. His first destination is Haiti, a country mostly famous for a dictatorship and a series of natural disasters. Accompanied by journalist Jeremy Dupin, he visits the iron market, attends vodou ceremonies, and explores a cathedral destroyed by an earthquake

programme.desc: DEA agents in St Louis tackle a growing heroin epidemic, one dealer at a time. And St Louis law enforcement pulls out every stop to reverse the city's culture of drugs

programme.title: Drug Wars
programme.desc: St Louis DEA expands its investigation into a suspected heroin dealer who has so far dodged them at every turn, and young addicts attempt to break their addiction

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank find a huge sculpture of Elvis and trawl through a trailer full of rare art and military memorabilia

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: Nat and John's day in Glasgow gets off to a flying start, but Dan's dirty tactics lead to mayhem within the team. Meanwhile, George finds himself with a new pet

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: The bidders head to Preston, where Dan's arrogant behaviour gets him into trouble once again. Presented by Sean Kelly

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys try to negotiate with a collector who demands a high price for every item up for sale, and check out a collection of Western memorabilia

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank explore a 135-year-old opera house full of memorabilia, and try to negotiate with a fellow picker charging a high price for his merchandise

programme.title: Cop Car Workshop
programme.desc: Police officers request a new police support unit or riot van, while a stolen car chase ends with an X5 wedged in a hedge. Boss Mick Sweetmore goes back to the floor with Merseyside's mental health team and discovers another side to modern-day policing - as well as the poor state of the vehicle they are currently using

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May travel to America to take a road trip from San Francisco to the heart of Utah in three new-generation muscle cars, hoping this time to avoid a pelting with rocks by a mob of angry locals. Back in the UK, the Fiat 500 Abarth gets a test-drive and Will Young is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by comedian Sara Pascoe for a two-day test of the mini break merits of Valencia, Spain's third largest city. After dropping their bags at the Hotel Caro, they set off along the path of the Turia river. Richard also enrols them at paella school to make authentic and vegan versions of the dish. The next day begins with a visit to Valencia's iconic City of Arts and Sciences, home to an Imax cinema, planetarium, opera house and aquarium, though Richard and Sara forgo these attractions to try zorbing instead

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and comedian Joe Lycett head to the mini break mecca of Amsterdam. Their two-day hurtle through the city's attractions takes in culture, canals, cuisine, and other things not necessarily beginning with C. As part of their whistle-stop tour, the duo doss down in one of the city's hippest hotels, take a battery-powered boat tour, do some drawing, and peer into the world of the water bear. The brave travellers also sample some Dutch gin known as jenever, and visit the city's street organ museum

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef heads north towards the Arctic Circle to explore the culinary delights of Reykjavik, coastal capital of Iceland. His aim is to enjoy the perfect winter break, enriched with a smorgasbord featuring the best ingredients the country has to offer - fjord-reared roast lamb, rye bread baked in volcanic sand and langoustine soup. Rick also resumes his search for the perfect cod

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: In an episode originally shown in 2011, Jeremy Clarkson celebrates the 50th anniversary of the Jaguar E-type by driving a modern-day interpretation of the classic sports car, and throws a typically low-key party involving live music, fighter planes and the Royal Marines. Richard Hammond is in South Africa, where he tests the Marauder, a bigger, more rugged alternative to the Humvee, and James May enlists the help of 2010 Winter Olympic skeleton gold medallist Amy Williams and former Intercontinental Rally Challenge champion Kris Meeke to try out a Mini rally car. Plus, the Stig takes the BMW 1 Series M Coupe around the test track and Alice Cooper gets behind the wheel of the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The trio travel to Italy to test high-performance hatchbacks. Jeremy Clarkson is in the Citroen DS3 Racing, Richard Hammond champions the Fiat 500C Abarth and James May makes the case for the Renaultsport Clio 200 Cup as they navigate their way round baffling Italian towns and take part in a scavenger hunt, before putting the cars through their paces on the F1 street circuit in Monaco. Also, petrolhead comedian Ross Noble is in the Reasonably Priced Car and the McLaren MP4-12C supercar comes under review

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade explores the Austrian capital in the company of his IT Crowd co-star Chris O'Dowd. Over a packed mini-break, they sample the city's finest sausages, cakes, wines and spirits and visit fairgrounds, cafes and sewers, while Richard suffers an allergic reaction and Chris breaks something valuable

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade goes hurtling through a ruthlessly efficient mini-break in Paris with presenter and comedian Mel Giedroyc. Their base is a chic hotel famed for being the place where Oscar Wilde died, but there's no time to hang about soaking up the literary atmosphere, as they head to the Montparnasse Tower for arguably the best view of Paris, and one which has the bonus of including the Eiffel Tower. There's also calf's head casserole and snails, a scooter tour, 'green fairy' absinthe, a Cordon Bleu cookery school, bespoke perfume and an art tour

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Beattie Edmondson, Amol Rajan, Gaby Roslin and Hugh Dennis test their general knowledge skills in a variety of entertaining trivia-based games this week

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Comedy panel show, hosted by Rob Brydon, in which team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by celebrity guests Denise Lewis, Richard Osman, Robert Rinder and Katherine Ryan to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Extended edition. Question master Stephen Fry continues the comedy panel quiz's exploration of subjects beginning with the letter L as he asks a range of fiendish questions on the topic of location, with points being awarded as usual for interesting answers as well as correct ones. Irish actress, comedienne and writer Aisling Bea makes her debut appearance on the programme, joining fellow stand-ups Jason Manford and Johnny Vegas and regular panellist Alan Davies, who are all hoping they don't fall into the QI elves' traps and set off the klaxon

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts the quiz with a difference as comedians Hannah Gadsby, Noel Fielding and Joe Lycett join regular panellist Alan Davies to answer questions on the theme of pictures, with points being awarded not only for correct answers, but also for interesting ones

programme.title: Hypothetical
programme.desc: Nish Kumar, Jen Brister, Rob Beckett and Lou Sanders are posed increasingly absurd hypothetical situations. Hosted by Josh Widdicombe and James Acaster

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Host Dara O Briain and regulars Hugh Dennis and Andy Parsons are joined by Gary Delaney, Rob Beckett, Romesh Ranganathan and Josh Widdicombe for an edition the topical comedy quiz from 2013, with the panellists giving their take on the week's major news stories

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Another set of apparently meaningless tasks are handed to five comedians by Taskmaster Greg Davies and his genial companion Alex Horne. Jessica Knappett piles shoes on some butcher's scales, James Acaster tries the emergency alarm on a lift, and Rhod Gilbert smears mustard in his eyes

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Host Rob Brydon and team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack return with previously unseen material from the latest run of the comedy panel show. Featuring appearances by guests including David Baddiel, Ed Balls, Jo Brand, Steve Davis, Susie Dent, Ade Edmondson, Sheila Hancock, Stephen Mangan, Bob Mortimer, Ore Oduba, Anita Rani, Fay Ripley, Stacey Solomon, Jordan Stephens, Claudia Winkleman and Kimberly Wyatt

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Extended edition. Question master Stephen Fry continues the comedy panel quiz's exploration of subjects beginning with the letter L as he asks a range of fiendish questions about literature and language. Stand-up comedian Lloyd Langford joins Bad Education star Jack Whitehall, Only Connect host Victoria Coren Mitchell and regular panellist Alan Davies

programme.title: QI XL

Along the way he gets the opportunity to drive a heritage diesel train, discovers why Norfolk black turkeys appeared on the Victorian Christmas menu, and samples classic Cromer crab

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo sets out to follow the route of the historic Irish mail service from Ledbury in Herefordshire to Holyhead on Anglesey. He begins by tasting the Victorian drink perry, meeting a pedigree Hereford bull and visiting the world's first iron-framed building in Shrewsbury, Shropshire

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo continues his journey along the route of the historic Irish mail service from Ledbury to Holyhead, stopping off in Coalbrookdale, Shropshire, to visit the world's first iron bridge. He also explores Wrexham's Chirk Castle, and tries his hand at making traditional Cheshire cheese

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo continues his journey along the Irish mail route beginning in Chester, where he takes a tour of Roman remains, and then visits a secret Second World War chemical plant at Rhydymwyn, Flintshire. After spending the night in Llandudno, he heads to the Conwy estuary for a spot of mussel fishing

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough explores nature's evolutionary anomalies and examines two creatures whose stretched features have given them an edge in the natural world. The chameleon has an extra-long tongue that helps it catch prey and the giraffe's neck is so long it is easily able to reach the tops of trees for food

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough highlights the curiosities that have led to accusations of forgery, but have ultimately helped assist the rethinking of evolution. When early explorers brought the first specimen of a duck-billed platypus to England in 1799, it was considered so bizarre it was deemed a hoax. Similarly, the midwife toad became the centre of a scientific storm in the 1920s that led to accusations of fakery

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough encounters two species with wrinkly skin, where nature has tinkered with the ageing process to different effect. The mole rat retains its looks while growing old and the elephant looks old from birth, yet both creatures live relatively long lives

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attend questions why spirals are so widespread in nature. He gleans some answers by examining the narwhal's tusk and the spiral shells found on snails and ammonites, as he continues to discover nature's evolutionary anomalies

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines a zebra's stripes and the wings of a butterfly, as he continues to discover nature's evolutionary anomalies

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: General von Flockenstoffen decides to launch a raid to capture Churchill, leaving the Colonel, Gruber and Bertorelli to resort to desperate measures to stop him

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!

programme.desc: How the morale of the Third Reich, boosted by Germany's initial military successes, was shattered by the devastating defeat at Stalingrad, relentless Allied bombing raids and an attempt on Hitler's life. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce looks back at the year's highlights and presents updates on popular items. There's a development concerning the tapestry stitched in tribute to the rock band Status Quo by a paralysed man, an update on what happened to a striking piece of Banksy art that appeared in Bristol in May, and exciting news about a Fabergé egg discovered at Wentworth Woodhouse. There's another chance to see keen model railway enthusiast Paul Atterbury get his hands on a train set that hadn't been out of its box for more than 70 years. Other highlights include a surprisingly valuable train ticket and a clock once given as a gift by Queen Victoria

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: Heavy haulage experts Ian Bagladi and Jamie Turnbull need to move a classical but abandoned 63-year-old, 70-tonne locomotive, through the English countryside

programme.title: The Architecture The Railways Built

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Armed with his 1913 railway guide, Michael Portillo travels from the Swiss Alps to the shores of Lake Geneva. Along the way, he is caught up in a war zone with the Red Cross and rescued from an 'avalanche' by a St Bernard puppy. He takes to the skies in a vintage bi-plane to retrace the epic journey of the pioneering pilot who was first to fly over the Alps, and tries his hand at watchmaking, James Bond style

programme.desc: A seemingly endless concrete line stretching through the French countryside, which sits as a monument to a discarded engineering advancement

programme.title: Secrets of the Railways
programme.desc: An exploration of the Harz Mountain Railway in Germany - Europe's longest rail network - which still uses steam locomotives and has a murky, hidden past

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Chris crosses Australia from south to north following the original ill-fated route of the 2,000 mile-long Adelaide to Darwin railway. After beginning his journey on a luxury modern train, he transfers to one of the line's surviving steam locomotives before hitting the Outback, where he quickly concludes that a 4x4 is a more practical means of travelling. He passes through ghost towns and explores abandoned railway relics before uncovering why most of the southern section of the line eventually had to be abandoned. At Alice Springs he hitches a ride on a freight train headed for Darwin and reaches his final destination after nearly 24 hours in the cramped cab

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a restaurant in Mount Sinai, New York, which appears to be stuck in the 1980s. The crumbling decor and unenthusiastic head chef at the Handlebar need to be tackled, but owners Bill and Carolyn LeRoy are in denial about the problems they face

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Italian family restaurant Sabatiello's in Stamford, Connecticut, where the owner's fiery temper upsets the staff and has left him more than $1million in debt. Gordon's help is urgently needed to get customers back through the door, but the restaurateur does not take kindly to criticism and closes the restaurant down when his employees turn on him

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of Anthony Trobiano, whose restaurant in Great Neck, New York, is failing even though his partner's parents have given him their life savings and he has taken out half a million dollars in loans. Gordon has some harsh criticism about the unhygienic kitchen and the quality of the food being served, but the owner has trouble accepting his advice

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on programmes including I'm a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here!, Michael McIntyre's The Wheel, Tiny World, The Undoing, This Morning, Good Morning Britain and First Dates. They also comment on the issue of lockdown tiers as reported on BBC News

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes a professional dancer from London who is seeking a man to lose his virginity with - and who can keep up with him on the dance floor. The second of this episode's contestants is a rugby player who has been out of the dating game for a while and is shy around women, but hopes that seeing a potential date naked will give him a confidence boost

programme.title: The Crystal Maze
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade hosts the game show, inviting TV presenter Laura Whitmore, comedian Chris Ramsey, Diversity dancers Perri Kiely and Jordan Banjo, and former rugby player Gareth Thomas to take his hand and tackle a number of physical, skill, mystery and mental challenges. Their aim is to win the elusive crystals - and the more they get, the more time they get in the Crystal Dome

programme.title: Britain's Wildest Weather
programme.desc: Footage of the most extreme weather conditions in the UK over the past year, from the worst floods in a decade and a freak landslide in Fife, to an account of being in a house when it is struck by lightning. The programme also explains the scientific reasons behind the wildfire that destroyed one of the UK's most precious nature reserves, as well as a look back at record-breaking days of both heat and rain

programme.title: Grayson's Art Club
programme.desc: Alongside his wife, psychotherapist and author Philippa Perry, Grayson takes viewers behind the scenes at Manchester Art Gallery for the preparation of an exhibition of work produced during his six-part series Grayson's Art Club. The artist is reunited with some of the members of the public who had their entries selected for the exhibition, as well as some of the celebrity guests and well-known artists from the show. Once lockdown is lifted, Manchester Art Gallery will re-open with Grayson's Art Club, which will run until mid-April

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: Following Sarah Beeny and her family as they relocate from London to Somerset, renovating a semi-derelict former dairy farm into their dream family home. In this episode, Sarah and Graham get to work on the foundations of their new dream house, while Raffey and Laurie try to bring in some extra cash for the farm with a petting zoo for the public. Sarah wants to one day plant a truffle wood on the farm and has high hopes that Maple the dog can be trained to sniff truffles out, so she heads off to meet truffle hunter Tom to find out more

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers

programme.desc: Greg Davies presents another assortment of absurd assignments, as Alex Horne tries to ignore Richard Herring hiding menacingly in a bush, Katherine Parkinson pays a visit to the fridge, Mawaan Rizwan steals a cup of tea and Johnny Vegas takes a tumble

programme.title: Inside Poundland: Secrets from the Shop Floor
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary following the retailer's bid to shed its bargain basement reputation and go upmarket in an effort to attract new customers. Managing director Barry visits the Walsall branch to help with the launch of Project Diamond - a multimillion-pound investment into giving stores a makeover and branching into new product lines like frozen and chilled food

programme.title: Luxury Christmas for Less
programme.desc: Sabrina Grant and Helen Skelton speak to former supermarket insiders and uncover what the stores know about people's tastes and shopping habits - and reveal how consumers can use that knowledge to get a brilliant Christmas at bargain prices. Retail psychologists explain the covert role of party food in getting customers to spend more than they need to, and why they are wasting money on champagne when they could buy just as good fizz for half the price

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: Sheffield architects Howard Evans and Prue Chiles set out to transform Mandy's 1980s redbrick house, which stands out like a sore thumb among the grand Victorian properties it sits alongside on Nottingham's prestigious Park Estate. The duo are familiar with unlocking the potential of buildings, but this could be their biggest challenge yet

programme.title: Grayson's Art Club
programme.desc: Alongside his wife, psychotherapist and author Philippa Perry, Grayson takes viewers behind the scenes at Manchester Art Gallery for the preparation of an exhibition of work produced during his six-part series Grayson's Art Club. The artist is reunited with some of the members of the public who had their entries selected for the exhibition, as well as some of the celebrity guests and well-known artists from the show. programme.desc: A paroled sex offender is suspected of murder when the abused body of an eight-year-old boy is found in a park - but the investigators face a tough challenge when they arrive at the man's house, only to find a mob of angry parents baying for blood outside. Police drama, with Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson tries to reason with a woman who has taken a man hostage, while the team discovers the reasons for her desperate actions

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An old man is fatally shot on a subway platform, but the investigation reveals the victim is in fact a woman wearing an elaborate disguise. Inquiries fail to reveal her identity, but Hawkes makes an intriguing discovery regarding the nature of the murder weapon, providing the team with a more viable lead. Meanwhile, Jo decides the time is right to tell daughter Ellie the truth about her biological mother

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Hawkes is persuaded by his girlfriend Camille to call in sick so he can join her at a food festival, but a stall explodes during the event - exposing his deception to his colleagues. The team's investigation reveals that something other than food was potentially being sold by the vendors, and a lead emerges with a link to another suspect

programme.title: Columbo: Murder in Malibu (1990)
programme.desc: A wealthy romantic novelist realises her lover is only marrying her for her money and calls off their wedding - only to be subsequently murdered. The fiance is quickly cleared of all suspicion, but Columbo remains sure of his guilt. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Andrew Stevens, Brenda Vaccaro and Laurie Walters

programme.title: Columbo: Dagger of the Mind (1972)
programme.desc: A London theatre producer discovers his actress wife is having an affair with her co-star in their latest production. To avoid exposure, the pair murder him and make it look as if his death was an accident. Meanwhile, Columbo is in the city to pick up some tips from Scotland Yard, and sets about uncovering the truth. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Honor Blackman, Richard Basehart and Wilfrid Hyde White

programme.title: Columbo: Candidate for Crime (1973)
programme.desc: An ambitious senatorial candidate murders his campaign manager for threatening to expose his secret affair. To avoid suspicion, the politician makes the killing look as if he was the intended target of an assassination attempt that went wrong - but ends up having to pit his wits against the slovenly sleuth. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Jackie Cooper, Ken Swofford and Tisha Sterling

programme.title: Columbo: Death Hits the Jackpot (1991)
programme.desc: A photographer going through a divorce asks his jeweller uncle to cash in his winning lottery ticket to prevent his wife from getting a share. Seizing the opportunity to keep the money, the greedy older man kills his nephew - but has reckoned without Columbo's intervention. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Rip Torn, Gary Kroeger and Jamie Rose

programme.title: Columbo: Sex and the Married Detective (1989)
programme.desc: A sex therapist tries to pin the blame for the murder of her unfaithful lover on her assistant, but the dishevelled detective is not convinced by the ruse and seeks to identify a mysterious woman in black who was spotted leaving the scene of the crime. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Lindsay Crouse, Peter Jurasik and Julia Montgomery

programme.title: Columbo: Strange Bedfellows (1995)
programme.desc: A horse trainer outraged by his brother's gambling debts murders both him and the bookie he owes money to, then claims one killed the other. Columbo is not convinced by his story and goes in search of the truth, and finds help from an unlikely source when a Mob enforcer is sent to investigate the bookie's death. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Rod Steiger and George Wendt

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A psychiatrist is found murdered, leading Goren and Eames to suspect an ophthalmologist may be involved, especially when they realise that his research into schizophrenia could be masking mental health problems of his own. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler suspects Benson may be in danger during an investigation into a stalker the officers believe to be responsible for the murder of an assistant district attorney. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An investment analyst is found hanged from her four-poster bed, her body covered in piercings, cuts and bruises, leading the police to conclude her death occurred during a kinky sex session. The discovery of a whip containing half a million dollars in cash intrigues the officers further - but they face the task of tracking down the woman's partner to solve the mystery. Crime drama, with Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson's suspicions about a kidnapping victim lead her to uncover a criminal network that will go to any lengths to silence those that threaten their plans

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate the murder of a 14-year-old immigrant girl, and initially suspect the involvement of a thug with a history of violence - but the case is complicated by the discovery that the victim was married to a 35-year-old polygamist

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The detectives suspect a woman's murder could be the work of a serial killer, while Mac reconnects with his first partner, who is being stalked by an ex-con the pair put behind bars. Crime drama, guest starring Peter Fonda, with Gary Sinise

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A near-fatal experience prompts Mac to consider ending his career, but before he makes a decision he returns to his last unsolved case so he can be at peace with his ultimate choice. programme.title: Chicago PD

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy tries to trap a crooked lawyer who bribes his clients - but as he tries to track down the man's accomplice, he realises the investigation has placed his own job on the line. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An answering machine message leads Briscoe and Curtis to reopen an investigation into an arson attack that killed a girl - but the 15-year-old suspect has a powerful ally in his grandfather, an influential force in political spheres. Award-winning police drama, guest starring Robert Vaughn (Hustle) alongside Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of a Middle Eastern man sends Briscoe and Curtis racing to thwart a suspected terrorist plot to bring destruction to New York - and leads them to uncover a domestic conspiracy involving horrific female circumcision. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A gay city councillor is shot dead after a meeting, and the trail of suspicion leads the team to a bigoted rival politician and a male prostitute. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Tensions are high between new partners Briscoe and Curtis as they investigate the murder of a wealthy student in a biker bar. The detectives discover the victim's father had offered him $10,000 to drop his hobby and his biker girlfriend. Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of an undercover narcotics agent during a drugs raid splits Kincaid and McCoy over whether or not to ask for the newly reinstated death penalty. Ultimately, District Attorney Schiff must make the call. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jill Hennessy

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates when a mysterious, fast-spreading illness strikes children from military families. While Gibbs tries to determine the cause, Abby and Jimmy partner with the Naval Medical Research Centre in the hope of delivering a cure before the holidays. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A petty officer is killed by a stolen surveillance drone and the team links it to elusive terrorist Benham Parsa. NCIS joins forces with the Department of Defence to track down the device before it is used for a large-scale attack, but Gibbs is less than pleased that he has to work with his ex-lover Hollis Mann. Meanwhile, McGee hopes he will be granted time off to attend a black-tie gala honouring his girlfriend Delilah. Guest starring Susanna Thompson (Arrow)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: A captain on board a yacht is shot dead, and a waiter is found with his throat cut. The crimes are thought to have been committed in waters that are known to be smuggling territory, and when it emerges the vessel belongs to Garcia, the head of a drugs cartel, the coastguard calls the NCIS team to investigate. However, when Pride begins his inquiries, he realises a parallel case run by the FBI could complicate matters, as could an encounter with an old friend - who is now engaged to Garcia

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Pride decides to act without the FBI's knowledge to deal with drug baron Garcia, and as he takes matters into his own hands, his NCIS comrades volunteer to help - without knowing the full consequences of their involvement. Sebastian goes undercover to bring down the cartel leader, while Patton must employ his old gambling tricks to set Pride's dangerous plan in motion

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Pride travels to a deep-sea oil rig to investigate a murder, but his life is placed in peril when the team discovers a gas leak on-site is on the verge of causing a catastrophic explosion. With their boss trapped on board the facility, the agents work to save him while he continues to pursue the killer. Meanwhile, Gregorio begins her first day as an official member of the NCIS team

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman who claims she has been raped turns to the Unit for help, but the team cannot get enough evidence against the prime suspect and is forced to drop the case. However, another victim comes forward six months later with a similar story, making them believe they have made a terrible mistake. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Benson get mixed up in the murky world of politics after a coalition leader's gay son is found murdered on the roof of his apartment. The finger of suspicion points to a notorious rapist, who has just been released from prison on parole, but he insists he didn't commit the crime - so further DNA tests are used to shed light on the death. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A socialite's body is found in Central Park, and detectives Benson and Stabler initially suspect her wealthy boyfriend of murder. Starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Saturday Night Out (1963)
programme.desc: Five sailors spend their overnight leave in London, where they get involved with a variety of unusual characters. Drama, starring Bernard Lee, Heather Sears and John Bonney

programme.title: Kind Hearts and Coronets (1949)
programme.desc: The penniless grandson of a duke plots to eliminate the eight relatives standing between him and a vast inheritance. He shoots, drowns, poisons and explodes his way through his family tree, but his final triumph is ruined when his lady love's husband kills himself. Ealing black comedy, starring Alec Guinness as all eight potential victims, with Dennis Price, Valerie Hobson and Joan Greenwood

programme.title: Hot Enough for June (1964)
programme.desc: An unemployed writer gets a job for an industrialist and is sent on a business trip to Prague. However, he does not realise his boss is actually in the British Secret Service and is using him to unwittingly carry out an important mission - while his local chauffeur is really a Communist agent. Spy comedy, starring Dirk Bogarde, Sylva Koscina, Robert Morley, Leo McKern and John Le Mesurier

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Featuring Lee, Bermondsey and Stratford. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Swan Corner
programme.desc: A day in the life on the High Street in West Wickham, shot in 1968 on 8mm film. Showing activities at different times of the day, including The Swan Pub

programme.title: Miss Caribbean UK 2020
programme.desc: Caribbean beauty and culture is celebrated in this annual glitzy gala. Who will be crowned Miss Caribbean UK? Find out as glamourous contestants battle it out in this carnival-inspired event

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Michael Mosley and the team are in Chester to learn about an experiment to find out whether standing up a few more hours each day could have major health benefits. Gabriel Weston witnesses a womb transplant, Saleyha Ahsan shows how to stop someone choking and Chris van Tulleken finds out if vitamin supplements are important to wellbeing

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: A 36-year-old man with gout visits the hospital, and despite the ailment's age-old associations with elderly men and rich living, he discovers his is hereditary. The doctors hear from a woman seeking a dietary cure for depression, and a mother-of-three who has lived on pancakes and chocolate for two years. Dr Pixie McKenna is also on hand to reveal the truth about detox diets

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sisters Sharon and Tracey's lives are changed for ever when their husbands leave for work and never return. First episode of the popular comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: The sisters face up to the realities of life with their husbands in prison, and try to explain things to Tracey's son, Garth. Classic comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: Killing Hitler
programme.desc: Part one of two. A blend of documentary, dramatic reconstruction and expert military analysis brings to life the blueprint of Operation Foxley - a 1944 plan to assassinate Adolf Hitler. Featuring testimonies from operatives of Churchill's Special Operations Executive and one of the Fuehrer's most trusted bodyguards, the ethical right to kill an enemy head of state is debated during the unfolding story of LB/X - the man in charge of the plot to kill the Allies' most hated foe

programme.title: We Still Steal the Old Way (2017)
programme.desc: After their exploits in We Still Kill the Old Way, criminal outfit the Archer Gang encounters an old enemy when a daring heist ends with them behind bars, however that doesn't stop them attempting to break out an old friend. Prison drama, starring Ian Ogilvy, Billy Murray, Julian Glover and Lysette Anthony

programme.title: The Escort (2015)
programme.desc: A sex-obsessed journalist whose career is falling apart has a chance encounter in a bar with a high-class prostitute. Seeing a chance to write the story that will make him a success, he persuades her to let him document her life, and a strange connection develops between the two lonely outsiders. Comedy drama, starring Michael Doneger, Lyndsy Fonseca and Bruce Campbell

programme.title: Hoodluck (2020)
programme.desc: In the heart of southeast London, winning the lottery rarely happens, but then three guys - Solse, Festa and Kevin - come across a 'Be Lucky' lottery ticket in a stolen handbag

programme.title: A Moody Christmas
programme.desc: Dan shows off his new girlfriend to the family and Sean plans to pop the question to Peggy, but a surprise visit from jailbird Uncle Rhys is the biggest shock of all. Australian comedy, starring Ian Meadows

programme.title: The Ivy
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes as eminent restaurant The Ivy undergoes its first major renovation in 25 years. The programme follows director Fernando Peire and executive chef Gary Lee as they oversee the London institution's re-launch. Features interviews with clientele, including Calvin Klein, Dame Joan Collins, Maggi Hambling, Ronald Harwood, Tracey Emin and Julian Fellowes

programme.desc: An Irish music hall impresario comes to London to seek his fortune, and makes it big by buying a rundown theatre and transforming it into a major attraction. Drama based on the life of impresario George Edwardes, starring Richard Greene, Ann Todd, Hazel Court, Charles Victor and Peter Graves

programme.title: Too Many Crooks (1959)
programme.desc: Bungling crooks kidnap a millionaire's wife, but he is glad to be rid of her and refuses to pay the ransom - so she gets her own back by helping them steal all his cash instead. Comedy, starring Terry-Thomas, George Cole, Sid James, Brenda De Banzie and Bernard Bresslaw

programme.title: Ill Met By Moonlight (1957)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War thriller following the exploits of a squadron of British officers who head into Nazi-occupied Crete to kidnap a German general from under his comrades' noses, but struggle to transport their prisoner back to Cairo unnoticed. Starring Dirk Bogarde, Marius Goring and Cyril Cusack. Directed by frequent collaborators Michael Powell and Emeric Pressburger

programme.title: The Harassed Hero (1954)
programme.desc: A hypochondriac is ordered by his doctor to avoid stressful situations. Unfortunately, he inadvertently becomes involved in an explosive international criminal caper. Comedy, starring Guy Middleton and Joan Winmill Brown

programme.title: Killing Hitler
programme.desc: Part one of two. A blend of documentary, dramatic reconstruction and expert military analysis brings to life the blueprint of Operation Foxley - a 1944 plan to assassinate Adolf Hitler. Featuring testimonies from operatives of Churchill's Special Operations Executive and one of the Fuehrer's most trusted bodyguards, the ethical right to kill an enemy head of state is debated during the unfolding story of LB/X - the man in charge of the plot to kill the Allies' most hated foe

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Michael Mosley and the team are in Lancaster to find out how much air pollution a typical family breathes in and whether trees could be the answer to the problem. Chris van Tulleken explores the world of probiotics, Gabriel Weston examines a novel cure for migraines that was discovered by chance in a beauty clinic, and Saleyha Ahsan demonstrates how to revive a victim of drowning

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Generation
programme.desc: The extraordinary stories of some of the British men and women who fought or lived through the Second World War, now in their nineties or older. The first episode looks at how national unity was tested in the 1920s and 30s with class conflict, soaring unemployment and widespread civil unrest, but despite these upheavals, those growing up in the inter-war years remember much that was positive about life in Britain at the time. When war broke out in 1939, the men and women of this generation were ready to risk their lives for their country, but the evacuation of the British Army from the beaches of Dunkirk was a wake-up call for those expecting a swift victory

programme.title: St Paul's
programme.desc: Part one. Controversy surrounds the appointment of the first female priest at the famous London cathedral

programme.title: Sparks and Embers (2015)
programme.desc: A French woman living in London ends her relationship with her boyfriend when she decides to return to her own country. On the day she is due to leave, they meet again for one last goodbye. Despite knowing their break-up is for the best, both find themselves tempted to stay together - but neither feels brave enough to say it. Romantic comedy, starring Kris Marshall and Annelise Hesme

programme.title: Chubby Funny (2016)
programme.desc: An aspiring actor continually blames others for his failure to become a big star. He decides to give himself a year living in London to finally land his big break - but the personal crises that have dogged him all his life are not going away. Comedy drama, directed by and starring Harry Michell, with Augustus Prew and Jeff Rawle

programme.title: My Saviour (2019)
programme.desc: A woman whose life is in disarray is attacked by a local gang, only for a mysterious stranger to come to her rescue. Drama, starring Bayley Freer and Steven Murphy

programme.desc: Sitcom written by My Family creator Fred Barron, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst of only Only Fools and Horses fame as divorcee Jimmy Venables, whose ex-wife leaves to work as a nurse in Africa. He soon finds his efforts to raise his children - Molly, a girl who thinks she's a woman, and Alex, a boy who dresses like one - hindered by mother-in-law Diana, who takes it on herself to move in to the family home. programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Mollie King from the Saturdays tackles a series of fiendishly difficult challenges as she tries to win up to £250,000 for her chosen charity. Cheered by on bandmates Una Foden, Frankie Sandford, Rochelle Humes and Vanessa White in the studio, the singer is under intense pressure to hold her nerve and avoid slip-ups inside The Cube. Back in 2012, Mo Farah became the first contestant to walk away with the jackpot - a feat nobody else has managed since. How will Mollie compare to the Olympic gold medallist? Phillip Schofield is on hand to provide words of encouragement

programme.desc: Sri Lanka v India. Action from the final at the Wankhede Stadium in Mumbai, India, where the 10th world champions were crowned. However, Sri Lanka claimed impressive victories over England and New Zealand in the knockout stage to progress to the final, and only suffered one defeat in the group stage

programme.title: Live NFL
programme.desc: Pittsburgh Steelers v Washington Football Team (Kick-off 10.00pm). Coverage of the week 13 match from Heinz Field. The Steelers enter this contest with the best record in the NFL, a perfect 11-0, and will be favourites to triumph over a Washington outfit that has four wins and seven losses on it's ledger. Despite struggling to register more victories, the Football Team are still in with a chance of winning the NFC East and reaching the end-of-season play-offs, owing to the dearth of quality in their division

programme.title: Live NFL
programme.desc: San Francisco 49ers v Buffalo Bills (Kick-off 1.00am). Coverage of the match between the respective NFC West and AFC East sides, which takes place at Levi's Stadium. The Niners have been without their starting quarterback Jimmy Garoppolo for much of this campaign, which is partly responsible for their 5-6 record and sees them sit at the foot of the division. Meanwhile, the Bills have registered eights wins from their 11 matches, and are looking to win the AFC East for the first time since 1995, but face competition from the Miami Dolphins, who have a weaker strength of schedule following a poor season last year

programme.title: Ryder Cup Memories
programme.desc: Luke Donald shares his memories of the remarkable 2012 Ryder Cup in Medinah, where the European team made a staggering comeback to win on the final day. The Americans went into the final day with a 10-6 lead, needing just 4.5 points from the 12 singles matches to win, but the Europeans won eight and tied one of the 12 singles matches to claim a famous 14.5-13.5 victory

programme.title: Live NFL
programme.desc: Pittsburgh Steelers v Washington Football Team (Kick-off 10.00pm). Coverage of the week 13 match from Heinz Field. The Steelers enter this contest with the best record in the NFL, a perfect 11-0, and will be favourites to triumph over a Washington outfit that has four wins and seven losses on it's ledger. Despite struggling to register more victories, the Football Team are still in with a chance of winning the NFC East and reaching the end-of-season play-offs, owing to the dearth of quality in their division

programme.title: Live NFL
programme.desc: San Francisco 49ers v Buffalo Bills (Kick-off 1.00am). Coverage of the match between the respective NFC West and AFC East sides, which takes place at Levi's Stadium. The Niners have been without their starting quarterback Jimmy Garoppolo for much of this campaign, which is partly responsible for their 5-6 record and sees them sit at the foot of the division. Meanwhile, the Bills have registered eights wins from their 11 matches, and are looking to win the AFC East for the first time since 1995, but face competition from the Miami Dolphins, who have a weaker strength of schedule following a poor season last year
